_meta.comment: All addresses are returned in three formats: TRON Base58 (T-prefixed, 34 chars), EVM-style 0x-prefixed Hex (20 bytes), TRON-internal 41-prefixed Hex (21 bytes = 0x41 + EVM addr). Cross-chain bridges, EVM-side tooling, and Etherscan-like indexers want the 0x form; native TronWeb / TronGrid often want the 41 form; Tronscan / wallet UIs show Base58.

underlying.label: TRX native
underlying.note: TRX is the native chain asset, no TRC20 contract.

nile.note: Nile testnet addresses are sourced from @justlend/mcp-server-justlend src/core/chains.ts. Most non-jToken contracts on Nile are stub/placeholder addresses — call MCP `get_supported_networks`/`get_supported_markets` for runtime ground truth.
